name: Live Snaps 2026 (GitHub)
description:
Based on the code provided, here is a comprehensive summary of the Live Snaps application features, ranked by level of importance (Critical Core 
 Value-Add 
 Administrative).

1. Core Gameplay & Tracking (The "Must-Haves")
These features are essential for the app's primary purpose: tracking a live football game.

Real-Time Play Tracking:
Record every play details: Formation, Play Type (Offense/Defense/Special Teams), Ball Carrier/Passer/Receiver/Tackler, Yards Gained/Lost, and Result (TD, Fumble, etc.).
Automatic calculation of Down, Distance, and Possession based on play results.
Support for complex scenarios (Penalties, Safeties, Turnovers on Downs, 2pt conversions).
Visual Lineup Management:
Drag-and-Drop Interface: Drag players from the sideline onto the field visualization to set lineups.
Formation Presets: Pre-loaded offensive (I-Formation, Shotgun, etc.) and defensive (4-3, Nickel) formations.
Snap Counting: Automatically tracks how many offensive, defensive, and special teams plays each player participates in (crucial for youth football playing time rules).
Live Scoreboard & Clock:
Manage Game Clock, Quarter, Scores, Timeouts, and Possession.
Smart clock logic (automatically stops on incomplete passes, out of bounds, etc.).
"Wave" Substitutions:
A dedicated modal to mass-substitute players (swap starters for backups) quickly between plays.
2. Visualization & Fan Experience
Features designed to visualize the data for coaches and parents.

Interactive Drive Charts:
Visual SVG rendering of every drive, showing yardage gained/lost as arrows on a football field background.
Color-coded arrows for Runs, Passes, Kicks, and Turnovers.
Live Viewer Mode (Fan Portal):
A read-only interface for parents/fans to follow the game in real-time.
AI Voice Narration: Uses Google Gemini TTS to generate "Sportscaster" style audio commentary for every play.
Live Feed: Auto-scrolling text log of events.
"On Field" view showing exactly which kids are currently playing.
Play Log & History:
Scrollable, filterable log of every play in the game.
Ability to Edit, Delete, or Insert plays retroactively if a mistake was made.
3. Analytics & AI (The "Brain")
Advanced features using data and AI to provide coaching insights.

AI Tactical Breakdown (Gemini Powered):
Generates text summaries of "Game Breakdown," "Impact Plays," and "Things to Work On."
Analyzes formation efficiency and player highlights automatically.
Momentum Analytics:
Momentum Chart: A visual graph showing the swing of the game (Score Differential) over time.
Advanced Statistics:
Formation Efficiency: Tracks yards-per-play and success rates for specific formations.
Team Comparison: Side-by-side stats for First Downs, Total Yards, 3rd/4th Down Efficiency, and Turnovers.
Player Leaderboards: Top Passers, Rushers, Receivers, and Tacklers for the specific game.
4. Team Management & Customization
Features for setting up the season and roster.

Custom Formation Editor:
Create brand new formations from scratch.
Drag and drop positions (WR, QB, LT, etc.) to custom coordinates on the field.
Save, Duplicate, and Delete custom playbooks.
Roster Management:
Add/Edit players (Name, Jersey #, Positions, Photo).
Depth Chart: Drag-and-drop interface to set starters and backups for every position group.
Import/Export: Bulk import rosters and playbooks via Excel/CSV templates.
Schedule Management:
Manage the full season calendar (Opponents, Dates, Home/Away).
Track wins/losses/ties in a seasonal record.
5. Technical & Admin Utilities
System-level features.

Global Leaderboards (Admin):
Aggregate stats across all teams using the app to show league-wide leaders in Passing, Rushing, Defense, etc.
Deep System Diagnostics:
A health-check tool to verify Database Sync, Roster Integrity, and Browser Capabilities.
PDF Reporting:
Generate printable Game Summaries and Box Scores.
Offline/Online Sync:
Robust Firestore integration handles data syncing, with specific handling for spotty network connections (long-polling fallbacks).
Theming:
Support for Dark Mode, Light Mode, Material You, and Custom Team Colors.
